title: TSMC Summer 2025 - CAD/Software Intern Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# TSMC Summer 2025 - CAD/Software Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your TSMC Summer 2025 - CAD/Software Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from TSMC
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

TSMC is offering a Summer 2025 - CAD/Software Intern internship position in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research TSMC's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your TSMC interview and increase your chances of success.
